audit_rights.value: Achaogen has the right to inspect and audit the Assay manufacturing process and records upon reasonable notice during the Term.
audit_rights.exact_text: Achaogen shall have the right to inspect and audit [***] per calendar year (either by itself or through a Third Party reasonably acceptable to Microgenics) the Assay manufacturing process, facilities, procedures and records upon reasonable notice (which shall be no less than [***] ([***]) calendar days prior notice, unless a shorter period is mutually agreed to by the Parties), and during normal business hours.

fields.payment_terms: payment of all development payments described in Section 7.1
fields.notice_period: at least sixty (60) days prior written notice
